title: Stablecoin startup Rain joins Mastercard as a Principal Member
message_html: Stablecoin startup Rain joins Mastercard as a Principal Member ...
snippet: Rain, which was valued at $1.95 billion during a Series C round announced in January, has an existing relationship with card issuer Visa.

title: FINRA green lights Securitize for tokenized IPO underwriting and custody
message_html: FINRA green lights Securitize for tokenized IPO underwriting and custody ...
snippet: Securitize is the first firm to receive FINRA approval to custody tokenized securities and underwrite onchain IPOs and secondary offerings.

title: Binance is launching a withdrawal lock to help deter crypto wrench attacks
message_html: Binance is launching a withdrawal lock to help deter crypto wrench attacks ...
